message:
test(semantic_event): add 42 edge-case tests for Position, ChordKey, SwipeDirection, SemanticEvent (bd-17azz)

Cover manhattan distance extremes, hash/copy semantics, button/position
extraction for all variants, NaN velocity, zero-length drags, and
empty chord sequences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
